module.name: ast/search
module.description: Higher-level AST search helpers built on visitor-key traversal.

scenarios.name: should return the first descendant that matches the predicate
scenarios.given: a root AST node whose traversable descendants include a node that satisfies the predicate
scenarios.then: returns the first matching descendant node

scenarios.name: should stop descending into nodes that satisfy the stop predicate
scenarios.given: a root AST node whose descendants would only match inside a subtree selected by the stop predicate
scenarios.when: findDescendant is called with that stop predicate
scenarios.then: returns null because the stopped subtree is not traversed

scenarios.name: should return true when any descendant matches the predicate
scenarios.given: a root AST node with at least one traversable descendant that satisfies the predicate

scenarios.name: should return false when no descendant matches the predicate
scenarios.given: a root AST node with no traversable descendant that satisfies the predicate
